use_cases: Display a Bolt.new platform branding badge on AI-generated code components
Mark features or content as originating from the Bolt.new ecosystem
Provide visual attribution for tools referencing the platform
Add a persistent brand indicator to demos or templates
ai_summary: A lightweight badge component for displaying Bolt.new platform branding on web content. Features automatic background color detection to adapt between light and dark variants, with configurable positioning (top-right, bottom-right, top-left, bottom-left), multiple sizes, and optional text variant. Designed for attribution and brand awareness in developer tooling contexts.
